evidence_summary: Round-235 stays inside the selected milestone-5 production-boundary slice, narrows MLF.Constraint.Types.Witness to abstract witness types plus selectors and smart constructors, moves raw EdgeWitness and InstanceWitness constructors behind MLF.Constraint.Types.Witness.Internal with an explicit MLF.Constraint.Types.Witness.TestSupport seam for malformed fixtures, rebuilds production witnesses through mkEdgeWitness in WitnessNorm and Rewrite, preserves downstream malformed-witness fail-closed checks and negative fixture coverage, leaves src-public unchanged, and passes git diff --check, focused guard/witness/elaboration selectors, and cabal build all && cabal test with 2572 examples and 0 failures. The production boundary freeze is complete, but milestone-5's full constructor-validation story is not yet closed, so status-only closeout should move milestone-5 from pending to in-progress rather than done.

completion_pointers.text: round-235 froze production witness construction behind abstract witness types plus explicit smart constructors, moved malformed fixtures to a test-only seam, rebuilt production reassembly through mkEdgeWitness, and passed focused guard suites plus the full cabal gate.

history_entries.text: round-235 moved milestone-5 in-progress by freezing the production witness-constructor boundary, preserving explicit malformed-fixture seams, and passing focused witness checks plus the full cabal gate.
